languages.text: {n}Судя по отметинам на форме солдата, он пережил столкновение с железными ксеносами. Едва ли он испытывал больший ужас при виде их длинных когтей, чем при мысли о том, что он стал препятствием на вашем пути.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Судя по отметинам на форме солдата, он пережил столкновение с железными ксеносами. Едва ли он испытывал больший ужас при виде их длинных когтей, чем при мысли о том, что он стал препятствием на вашем пути.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Judging by the marks on the soldier's uniform, he has survived an encounter with the metal xenos. Who is to say which he found more terrifying: the sight of their iron claws, or the prospect of being an obstacle in your path?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Судя по отметинам на форме солдата, он пережил столкновение с железными ксеносами. Едва ли он испытывал больший ужас при виде их длинных когтей, чем при мысли о том, что он стал препятствием на вашем пути.{/n}

{n}Judging by the marks on the soldier's uniform, he has survived an encounter with the metal xenos. Who is to say which he found more terrifying: the sight of their iron claws, or the prospect of being an obstacle in your path?{/n}

{n}Judging by the marks on the soldier's uniform, he has survived an encounter with the metal xenos. Who is to say which he found more terrifying: the sight of their iron claws, or the prospect of being an obstacle in your path?{/n}

languages.text: {n}A juzgar por las marcas del uniforme del soldado, ha sobrevivido a un encuentro con los xenos de metal. No está claro si le aterran más sus férreas garras o la idea de interponerse en tu camino.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Judging by the marks on the soldier's uniform, he has survived an encounter with the metal xenos. Who is to say which he found more terrifying: the sight of their iron claws, or the prospect of being an obstacle in your path?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A juzgar por las marcas del uniforme del soldado, ha sobrevivido a un encuentro con los xenos de metal. No está claro si le aterran más sus férreas garras o la idea de interponerse en tu camino.{/n}

languages.text: {n}从这士兵制服上的痕迹来看，他刚从那群金属异形手下死里逃生。谁知道在他眼里，哪个更可怕：是那些钢铁利爪的狰狞模样，亦或是成为了你前进道路上的阻碍？{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Judging by the marks on the soldier's uniform, he has survived an encounter with the metal xenos. Who is to say which he found more terrifying: the sight of their iron claws, or the prospect of being an obstacle in your path?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}从这士兵制服上的痕迹来看，他刚从那群金属异形手下死里逃生。谁知道在他眼里，哪个更可怕：是那些钢铁利爪的狰狞模样，亦或是成为了你前进道路上的阻碍？{/n}

languages.text: {n}À en juger par les marques sur l'uniforme du soldat, il a survécu à un affrontement avec les xénos. Comment savoir ce qu'il trouve le plus terrifiant : la vue de leurs griffes de fer ou l'idée de vous faire obstacle ?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Judging by the marks on the soldier's uniform, he has survived an encounter with the metal xenos. Who is to say which he found more terrifying: the sight of their iron claws, or the prospect of being an obstacle in your path?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}À en juger par les marques sur l'uniforme du soldat, il a survécu à un affrontement avec les xénos. Comment savoir ce qu'il trouve le plus terrifiant : la vue de leurs griffes de fer ou l'idée de vous faire obstacle ?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Askerin üniformasındaki izlere bakılırsa metal zenolarla olan bir karşılaşmadan sağ kurtulmuş. Demir pençelerinin görüntüsü mü yoksa yolunuza çıkan bir engel olma ihtimalini mi daha korkunç bulduğunu söylemek mümkün değil.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Judging by the marks on the soldier's uniform, he has survived an encounter with the metal xenos. Who is to say which he found more terrifying: the sight of their iron claws, or the prospect of being an obstacle in your path?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Askerin üniformasındaki izlere bakılırsa metal zenolarla olan bir karşılaşmadan sağ kurtulmuş. Demir pençelerinin görüntüsü mü yoksa yolunuza çıkan bir engel olma ihtimalini mi daha korkunç bulduğunu söylemek mümkün değil.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Den Spuren auf seiner Uniform nach zu urteilen, hat der Soldat eine Begegnung mit den Metallxenos überlebt. Was macht ihm wohl mehr Angst? Der Anblick ihrer eisernen Klauen oder der Gedanke, ein Hindernis auf deinem Weg zu sein?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Judging by the marks on the soldier's uniform, he has survived an encounter with the metal xenos. Who is to say which he found more terrifying: the sight of their iron claws, or the prospect of being an obstacle in your path?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Den Spuren auf seiner Uniform nach zu urteilen, hat der Soldat eine Begegnung mit den Metallxenos überlebt. Was macht ihm wohl mehr Angst? Der Anblick ihrer eisernen Klauen oder der Gedanke, ein Hindernis auf deinem Weg zu sein?{/n}

languages.text: {n}兵士の制服の傷跡から判断すると、彼は金属外敵との遭遇を生き延びた。彼にとって、より恐ろしいのは、鉄の爪の光景であったのか、それとも、自分の存在があなたの道に障害となることであるのか、誰にもわからない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Judging by the marks on the soldier's uniform, he has survived an encounter with the metal xenos. Who is to say which he found more terrifying: the sight of their iron claws, or the prospect of being an obstacle in your path?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}兵士の制服の傷跡から判断すると、彼は金属外敵との遭遇を生き延びた。彼にとって、より恐ろしいのは、鉄の爪の光景であったのか、それとも、自分の存在があなたの道に障害となることであるのか、誰にもわからない。{/n}
